article_meta.title: Family Welcome To The Future, Where AI Grandma Raises The Kid You Bought From The Baby Bank By: Elle Purnell November 19

reasoning: Strong identification of multiple clear bias instances in the author’s own prose with no attribution violations. Minor labeling issues and a few notable misses (e.g., loaded headline language) prevent a top score.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items are from the author’s prose; no quoted or clearly attributed source language was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Flagged passages are genuinely loaded, subjective, or sweeping in the author’s voice; choices are defensible even if some could fit alternate labels.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Misses several prominent biased phrasings, including the headline’s ‘the kid you bought from the baby bank,’ ‘porn-addled society,’ and ‘No one wants a creepy Minecraft Grandma,’ plus other loaded descriptors.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels are mostly appropriate; a couple are debatable (e.g., ‘necromancy’ as Subjective Qualifying Adjectives; ‘Negativity Bias’ where Opinion-as-Fact might fit better) but within a reasonable range.
